prompts: Apply SDeltaPhi-68. Determine whether the apparent cheapness of this AI system hides transition completion cost.
Apply SDeltaPhi-68 and SDeltaPhi-56. Compare free-tier and paid-tier intelligence by total task completion cost, not visible price alone.
Apply SDeltaPhi-68. Check whether the AI's surface identity exceeds its operational self-location.
Apply SDeltaPhi-68. Separate access to the brand name from access to actual capability layers.
Apply SDeltaPhi-68. Map where intelligence access cost has moved.
Apply SDeltaPhi-68. Do not treat cheap access as costless access.
